advisory.title: Temporary Fuel Surcharge Reduction
advisory.summary: Selected OceanJet routes will automatically use reduced Tourist/Open Air and Business Class fares starting June 8, 2026.
body: Following recent improvements in fuel prices, OceanJet will implement a reduction in the temporary fuel surcharge adjustment on selected routes.
A portion of the surcharge remains temporary to sustain safe and reliable operations and will be removed once fuel prices return to normal levels.
Routes not listed will remain unchanged at this time.

modules.name: Automatic Fare Engine
modules.description: Scheduled fare and advisory updates from online-config.json with offline fallback.

modules.name: Passenger Self-Service Hub
modules.description: Next trip, advisory, fare board, and claim quick access.

modules.name: Smart Alerts Center
modules.description: Rule-based delay/cancellation/watchlist alerts computed from schedule and manual status.

modules.name: Cashier Counter Plus
modules.description: Quick counter summary, current trip linkage, and daily receipt tools.

modules.name: Cloud Bridge
modules.description: Remote config URL, Apps Script endpoint, backup payload, and future online database bridge.

modules.name: Damage Detector Addon
modules.description: Manual evidence intake and QA exports without changing baggage formulas.

onlineEndpoints.notes: GitHub Pages can read this JSON. For writes, connect Google Apps Script, Firebase, Supabase, or another CORS-enabled endpoint later.

notificationTemplates.fareAdvisory: Updated OceanJet fares are now available for selected routes.

notificationTemplates.delayNotice: A trip needs staff review due to delay or cancellation status.
